name: Pinnacle Investment Management Group Limited
analysis: PNI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$17.1100, stop A$14.6124, target A$24.6028 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
